description: Fix review issues: empty userId in My Team tab, duplicate contest_entries subscriptions, fantasyTeamId nullability mismatch, leaderboard not handling new entries, FutureBuilder rebuild issue.
steps: Fix empty userId in _MyTeamTab - use Firebase Auth currentUser?.uid via authProvider
Fix duplicate subscriptions in LiveRankingRepository - subscribeToLeaderboard should watch 'leaderboard' table
Fix ContestEntryModel.fantasyTeamId to be non-nullable String with empty string fallback
Fix leaderboard update callback in ContestDetailNotifier to handle INSERT events (new entries)
Replace FutureBuilder in _MyTeamTab with a FutureProvider.family to avoid re-fetching on every rebuild
acceptance_criteria: My Team tab uses the authenticated user's uid from Firebase Auth
ContestEntryModel.fantasyTeamId is String (non-nullable) and toJson always includes it
Leaderboard update callback adds new entries when userId not found in current list
My Team tab uses a cached provider instead of creating a new future on every build
verification: Code review to confirm all fixes are correct since flutter SDK is not available
